Interface ImmutableHeap<T extends Comparable<T>>

All Superinterfaces:
Iterable<T>, Serializable
All Known Implementing Classes:
ImmutableLeftistHeap
public interface ImmutableHeap<T extends Comparable<T>> extends Serializable, Iterable<T>
Interface for heaps of objects of class T. T has to implement the interface Comparable, and the heap is able to return the minimum member regarding the relation compareTo of T via the method findMin. Elements of the interface Heap are immutable. Implementations of Heap have to provide an attribute EMPTY_HEAP, which is a singleton representing empty heaps. Heaps may contain multiple references to one object, or multiple objects which are equal.

  • Method Details

    • isEmpty

      boolean isEmpty()
      Returns:
      true iff this heap is empty

    • insert

      ImmutableHeap<T> insert(T element)
      Add an element to this heap object
      Parameters:
      element - The element to be added
      Returns:
      a heap that contains all elements of this heap, and additionally element

    • insert

      ImmutableHeap<T> insert(Iterator<T> elements)
      Add multiple elements to this heap object
      Parameters:
      elements - The elements to be added
      Returns:
      a heap that contains all elements of this heap, and additionally all objects from elements

    • insert

      ImmutableHeap<T> insert(ImmutableHeap<T> h)
      Add multiple elements to this heap object
      Parameters:
      h - a heap containing the elements to be added
      Returns:
      a heap that contains all elements of this heap, and additionally all objects from h

    • findMin

      T findMin()
      Returns:
      the minimum element of this heap, or null iff this heap is empty (isEmpty()==true)

    • deleteMin

      ImmutableHeap<T> deleteMin()
      Remove the minimum element from this heap
      Returns:
      a heap that contains all elements of this heap except for the minimum element

    • removeAll

      ImmutableHeap<T> removeAll(T element)
      Remove all elements of this heap which are equal to element.
      Returns:
      heap that has all occurrences of element removed

    • size

      int size()
      Returns:
      the number of elements this heap holds

    • sortedIterator

      Iterator<T> sortedIterator()
      Returns:
      an iterator that returns all elements of this heap in increasing order
